arts.ttl: Romano reveals Chilwell transfer stance after Chelsea U-turn
arts.sum: “This summer there were clubs interested in Ben Chilwell, but the player wasn’t simply going to accept everything just because Chelsea wanted him to find a solution,” Romano told CaughtOffside . Chilwell will thus be reintegrated into the Blues squad and Fabrizio Romano has revealed that the left-back was determined not to leave his lucrative contract for inferior offers during the summer.

arts.ttl: Why Enzo Fernandez is absent from Enzo Maresca's Chelsea squad to face Bournemouth
arts.sum: Enzo Fernandez is not part of Enzo Maresca's Chelsea squad for Saturday evening's Premier League clash away at Bournemouth. A key part of Maresca's Chelsea midfield, the Argentina international has been replaced in the team by summer signing Renato Veiga.

arts.ttl: Chelsea supporters rattled after Loftus-Cheek makes exit admission
arts.sum: “I think if you’re a youngster, seven or eight years old, and you’ve signed with Chelsea, fantastic because it’s a great academy and you’ll learn how to play football and you’ll develop your skills there, and a great coach is coaching you. Ruben Loftus-Cheek has upset Chelsea supporters after he made comments about his exit from the London club.
